## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the distinction between Cancun and Riviera Maya for tourism content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Riviera Maya ≠ Cancun: \~60-65% of Cancun Adventures' customers stay in Riviera Maya, not Cancun's Hotel Zone](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Geographic nuance crucial: "Cancun" often misused for entire region; affects tour logistics, content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Opportunity: Leverage lesser-known Riviera Maya destinations in content (e.g., Tulum, Playa del Carmen)](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Hotel Zone vs. Riviera Maya: Drastically different experiences (walkability, nightlife, shopping, transportation)](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

## Topics

### Cancun vs. Riviera Maya Distinction

  - [Cancun's Hotel Zone:](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [Walkable, easy public transportation](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [More readily available online information](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
      - [Highly competitive for tour agencies (cheaper options, on-site sellers)](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Riviera Maya:](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
      - [Includes Tulum, Cozumel; \~100km from Cancun](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Resorts are larger, more isolated](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [Requires car rental for exploration](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [Different nightlife, shopping experiences (e.g., 5th Avenue in Playa del Carmen)](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### Content Strategy Implications

  - ["Cancun" keyword stronger, but potentially misleading](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Opportunity to create Riviera Maya-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Consider separate articles for Hotel Zone vs. Riviera Maya experiences](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Highlight logistical differences (e.g., distances, transportation needs)](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Potential to target lesser-known areas (e.g., Akumal, Puerto Aventuras) for niche content](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

### Tour Operations Insights

  - [Most Cancun Adventures guests stay in Riviera Maya, not Hotel Zone](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Multiple pickup stops cause longer travel times, occasional complaints](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Different tour dynamics between Hotel Zone (competitive, on-site sales) and Riviera Maya](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Cultural/Tourist Behavior Notes

  - [Some tourists say "Cancun" regardless of specific location (e.g., Tulum)](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Cancun perceived as more "city-like," catering to American tourists](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Riviera Maya offers a different, more nature-oriented experience](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create separate content strategies for Cancun Hotel Zone and Riviera Maya](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Develop articles highlighting the differences between the two areas](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Explore content opportunities for lesser-known Riviera Maya destinations](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Consider adding disclaimers/explanations about distances and travel logistics in tour descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Investigate keyword volumes for specific Riviera Maya locations (e.g., Tulum, Playa del Carmen)](https://fathom.video/share/wCzzjp2wqsk9jXKPHTSCFW5X7BGi1jeV?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
